details.quote: Sometimes we get this information through the Pinterest Tag (a piece of code an advertiser puts on their site), which delivers insights to us and our ad partners about actions that a person takes on their website after viewing an ad on our Services.
details.what_is_tracked: User actions on advertiser websites after viewing an ad on Pinterest

mentions_legales.label: Dénomination sociale (nom/raison sociale)
mentions_legales.quote: Pinterest Europe Ltd. is an Irish company with its registered office at Waterloo Exchange, 3rd Floor, Waterloo Road, Dublin 4, Ireland. Pinterest, Inc. is a US company with its registered office at 651 Brannan St., San Francisco, CA 94107, USA.

mentions_legales.label: Adresse de l'établissement / siège social
mentions_legales.quote: Pinterest Europe Ltd. is an Irish company with its registered office at Waterloo Exchange, 3rd Floor, Waterloo Road, Dublin 4, Ireland.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Identité du Responsable de Traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Pinterest Europe Ltd. and Pinterest, Inc. are joint data controllers of your personal data.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Coordonnées du DPO
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: If you have any questions about our data processing activities, please contact our Data Protection Officer.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Types de données collectées + raison
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - **Account Information**: When you join our Services, we collect information like your name, email address, birthday, gender, country of residence, your interests, and preferred language.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Base légale du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Under applicable data protection law in the European Region (such as the GDPR), companies must have a legal justification to process your information for the various purposes described in this Privacy Policy.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Durée de conservation des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We keep your information only so long as we need it to provide Pinterest to you and fulfill the purposes described in this policy.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Destinataires des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We disclose information such as cookie IDs, your IP address, or a hashed version of your email address to third parties, such as Facebook Ads, Google Marketing Platform, and others who may combine that information with other information they already have about you and deliver ads about Pinterest to you.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Prise de décision automatisée
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Pinterest also has features that are supported by generative artificial intelligence technology.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : catégories concernées
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We also receive information about you and your activity outside Pinterest from our affiliates, advertisers, partners and other third parties we work with.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : source des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: For example, we may receive information about your visits to an advertiser's site, or purchases you made from them, or information about your interests from a third-party service, which we might use to help show you ads on the Service.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'introduire une plainte (CNIL)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: If we deny your request to exercise your rights, you may have the right to appeal our decision by contacting us using privacy-support@pinterest.com.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit de rectification
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - **Correction/rectification**: You can correct your information by updating information in your profile.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'accès
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - **Access**: You can request access to the information we collect and hold about you in a portable format.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à l'effacement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - **Deletion/erasure**: You can have your information deleted. In your settings, select “Delete your data and account” and follow the instructions.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la limitation du traitement
Droit à la portabilité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: - **Access**: You can request access to the information we collect and hold about you in a portable format.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'opposition
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: You may opt out at any time by following the instructions in your Privacy and Data Settings menu.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Date de dernière mise à jour de la politique

cookies.label: Présence d'une politique cookies
cookies.quote: For more information about how we use cookies, please review our Cookie Policy.

cookies.label: Retrait du consentement simple et à tout moment
Information sur le Responsable de Traitement
Finalité des cookies (claire et complète)
cookies.quote: We use your information in our efforts to improve our Services, keep our users and the public safe, and to protect legal interests.

cookies.label: Liste des partenaires à jour
cookies.quote: We disclose information such as cookie IDs, your IP address, or a hashed version of your email address to third parties, such as Facebook Ads, Google Marketing Platform, and others

cookies.label: Détail des types de cookies déposés
cookies.quote: We also use “cookies” or similar technologies to obtain log data.

cookies.label: Consentement requis pour l'outil statistique
cookies.quote: When we use cookies to learn about your behavior on or off of our services, we or our partners will obtain consent that we may need under applicable law.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Existence de transferts hors UE + destinataires
transferts_hors_ue.quote: By using our products or services, you authorize us to transfer and store your information outside your home country, including in the United States

transferts_hors_ue.label: Stockage cloud hors UE + localisation serveurs
